description: MCP server for weather, climate, air quality, agriculture, pollen and geocoding from measurespace.io

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.MeasureSpace/measure-space-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: API key for geocoding service (city name ↔ lat/lon)
environmentVariables.name: GEOCODING_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: API key for hourly weather forecast service
environmentVariables.name: HOURLY_WEATHER_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: API key for daily weather forecast service
environmentVariables.name: DAILY_WEATHER_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: API key for daily climate forecast service
environmentVariables.name: DAILY_CLIMATE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: API key for air quality forecast service
environmentVariables.name: AIR_QUALITY_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: API key for agriculture service (GDD, growth stage, etc.)
environmentVariables.name: AGRICULTURE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: API key for daily pollen forecast service
environmentVariables.name: POLLEN_API_KEY
